heroHeadline: Bad Bunny: Spotted at Coachella 2026 as Super Bowl Collaborator Karol G Makes History as First Latina Headliner
heroSubtitle: Tracking the rise from SoundCloud uploads in Vega Baja to 100 billion Spotify streams, 30 individual songs crossing 1 billion streams, and a historic Super Bowl LX halftime performance. Bad Bunny was spotted watching Coachella 2026 Weekend 1 incognito alongside The Weeknd (Apr 11); the next night, Super Bowl collaborator Karol G became the first Latina to headline Coachella (Apr 12) — a full-circle moment following Bad Bunny's own landmark 2023 headlining set. European leg of the Debí Tirar Más Fotos World Tour begins May 22, 2026 in Barcelona.
footerNote: Data sourced from Rimas Entertainment, Billboard, Spotify Newsroom, RIAA, Latin Recording Academy, Recording Academy, and major media
